description: A gate agent needs to manage the boarding process for a full flight.

nodes.task_description: Make pre-boarding announcements, inviting passengers who need extra assistance to board first.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes clear and timely announcements.

nodes.task_description: Board the aircraft by zones or groups, scanning each passenger's boarding pass.

expected_outcome.value: Agent follows the standard boarding procedure and scans all boarding passes.

nodes.task_description: Reconcile the passenger count with the flight manifest and formally close the flight.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all boarded passengers are on the manifest and closes the flight in the system.
